children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “country of risk” means a foreign country determined by the Secretary, in accordance with subparagraph (B), to present a risk of theft of United States intellectual property or a threat to the national security of the United States if nationals of the country, or entities owned or controlled by the country or nationals of the country, participate in any research, development, demonstration, or deployment activity authorized under this division or division A or an amendment made by this division or division A.

children.label: i
children.text: the most recent World Wide Threat Assessment of the United States Intelligence Community, prepared by the Director of National Intelligence; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the most recent National Counterintelligence Strategy of the United States.

children.heading: Covered support
children.label: 2 Covered support
children.text: The term “covered support” means any grant, contract, subcontract, award, loan, program, support, or other activity authorized under this division or division A, or an amendment made by this division or division A.

children.label: A
children.text: identified under section 1237(b) of the Strom Thurmond National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 1999 ( note; );50 U.S.C. 1701Public Law 105–261

children.label: B
children.text: identified under section 1260H of the William M. (Mac) Thornberry National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2021 ( note; );10 U.S.C. 113Public Law 116–283

children.label: C
children.text: on the Entity List maintained by the Bureau of Industry and Security of the Department of Commerce and set forth in Supplement No. 4 to part 744 of title 15, Code of Federal Regulations;

children.label: D
children.text: included in the list required by section 9(b)(3) of the Uyghur Human Rights Policy Act of 2020 (; ); orPublic Law 116–145134 Stat. 656

children.label: i
children.text: to the national security of the United States; or

children.label: ii
children.text: of theft or loss of United States intellectual property.

children.heading: National
children.label: 4 National
children.text: The term “national” has the meaning given the term in .section 1101 of title 8

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 5 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Energy.

children.heading: Science and technology risk assessment
children.label: b Science and technology risk assessment

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall develop and maintain tools and processes to manage and mitigate research security risks, such as a science and technology risk matrix, informed by threats identified by the Director of the Office of Intelligence and Counterintelligence, to facilitate determinations of the risk of loss of United States intellectual property or threat to the national security of the United States posed by activities carried out under any covered support.

children.label: A
children.text: deploy risk-based approaches to evaluating, awarding, and managing certain research, development, demonstration, and deployment activities, including designations that will indicate the relative risk of activities;

children.label: B
children.text: assess, to the extent practicable, ongoing high-risk activities;

children.label: C
children.text: designate an officer or employee of the Department of Energy to be responsible for tracking and notifying recipients of any covered support of unmanageable threats to United States national security or of theft or loss of United States intellectual property posed by an entity of concern;

children.label: D
children.text: consider requiring recipients of covered support to implement additional research security mitigations for higher-risk activities if appropriate; and

children.label: E
children.text: support the development of research security training for recipients of covered support on the risks posed by entities of concern.

children.heading: Annual updates
children.label: 3 Annual updates
children.text: The tools and processes developed under paragraph (1) shall be evaluated annually and updated as needed, with threat-informed input from the Office of Intelligence and Counterintelligence, to reflect changes in the risk designation under paragraph (2)(A) of research, development, demonstration, and deployment activities conducted by the Department.

children.heading: Prohibition
children.label: 1 Prohibition
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), no entity of concern, or individual that owns or controls, is owned or controlled by, or is under common ownership or control with an entity of concern, may receive, or perform work under, any covered support.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary may waive the prohibition under paragraph (1) if determined by the Secretary to be in the national interest.

children.heading: Notification to Congress
children.label: B Notification to Congress
children.text: Not less than 2 weeks prior to issuing a waiver under subparagraph (A), the Secretary shall notify the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources of the Senate and the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology of the House of Representatives of the intent to issue the waiver, including a justification for the waiver.

children.heading: Termination of support
children.label: A Termination of support
children.text: On finding that any entity of concern or individual described in paragraph (1) has received covered support and has not received a waiver under paragraph (2), the Secretary shall terminate all covered support to that entity of concern or individual, as applicable.

children.label: i
children.text: prohibited from receiving or participating in covered support for a period of not less than 1 year but not more than 10 years, as determined by the Secretary; or

children.label: ii
children.text: instead of the penalty described in clause (i), subject to any other penalties authorized under applicable law or regulations that the Secretary determines to be in the national interest.

children.heading: Notification to Congress
children.label: C Notification to Congress
children.text: Prior to imposing a penalty under subparagraph (B), the Secretary shall notify the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources of the Senate and the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology of the House of Representatives of the intent to impose the penalty, including a description of and justification for the penalty.

children.label: A
children.text: share information about the unmanageable threats described in subsection (a)(3)(E) with other Federal agencies; and

children.label: B
children.text: develop consistent approaches to identifying entities of concern.

children.heading: International agreements
children.label: d International agreements
children.text: This section shall be applied in a manner consistent with the obligations of the United States under international agreements.

children.label: A
children.text: the tools and processes developed under subsection (b)(1) and any updates to those tools and processes; and

children.label: B
children.text: if applicable, the science and technology risk matrix developed under that subsection and how that matrix has been applied;
includes a mitigation plan for managing risks posed by countries of risk with respect to future or ongoing research and development activities of the Department of Energy; and
defines critical research areas, designated by risk, as determined by the Secretary.
